Health Literacy (Dsch) CHAR 1 This column documents, at the time of discharge, how often the patient need to have someone help them when they read instructions, pamphlets, or other written material from their doctor 
or pharmacy. 0 = Never
1 = Rarely
2 = Sometimes
3 = Often
4 = Always
7 = Patient declines to respond
8 = Patient unable to respond
